code: import React,{useState}from"react";import{ProjectData}from"./projectData";import{FaArrowAltCircleRight,FaArrowAltCircleLeft}from"react-icons/fa";import{ReactComponent as Cursor}from"./../assets/images/cursorDark.svg";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ProjectSlider=_ref=>{let{setBackground}=_ref;const[current,setCurrent]=useState(0);const length=ProjectData.length;const backgroundImage=b=>{setBackground(b);};const nextSlide=()=>{setCurrent(current===length-1?0:current+1);};const prevSlide=()=>{setCurrent(current===0?length-1:current-1);};if(!Array.isArray(ProjectData)||ProjectData.length<=0){return null;}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{className:"slider",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Cursor,{className:"left-arrow",onClick:prevSlide}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Cursor,{className:"right-arrow",onClick:nextSlide}),ProjectData.map((slide,index)=>{return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:index===current?"slide active":"slide",onChange:setBackground(current),children:index===current&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{style:slide.transform?slide.transform:null,src:slide.img,alt:"project image",className:"image"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"detail",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h4",{children:slide.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"desc",children:slide.description}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[Array.isArray(slide.stack)?slide.stack.map((sub_stack,outer_index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:sub_stack.map((stack_text,inner_index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"stack",children:stack_text},inner_index))})):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"stack",style:{textTransform:null,paddingTop:'10px'},children:slide.stack})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:slide.link,target:"_blank",children:"visit \u21B5"})})]})]})]})},index);})]});};export default ProjectSlider;
